name: @aperturerobotics/bldr
description: application bundler and user interface toolkit

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.start:cli: bun run bldr -- start cli bldr-demo-cli --
scripts.start:desktop: bun run bldr -- start --plugins web desktop
scripts.start:desktop:release: bun run build:release && cd ./.bldr/build/desktop/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/bldr-demo-release/dist && ./bldr-demo
scripts.start:web: bun run bldr -- --minify-entrypoint=false start --plugins web web
scripts.start:web:wasm: bun run bldr -- --log-level debug --minify-entrypoint=false start web --wasm
scripts.start:web:release: bun run build:release:web && bun run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/web/js/wasm/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.start:web:release:debug: bun run build:release:web:debug && bun run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/web/js/wasm/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.build:cli: bun run bldr -- start cli bldr-demo-cli -- --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && mkdir -p bin && cp .bldr/cli/bldr-demo-cli/dist/bldr-demo-cli bin/bldr-demo-cli
scripts.dist: bun run build:release:web && bun run publish:release
scripts.gen: bun run gen:proto && bun run gen:deps && bun run gen:go
scripts.gen:force: bun run gen:proto:force && bun run gen:deps && bun run gen:go
scripts.gen:deps: bun -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const distPkg = require('./dist/deps/package.json'); Object.entries(pkg.dependencies).forEach(([name, version]) => { if (distPkg.dependencies[name]) { distPkg.dependencies[name] = version; } }); Object.entries(pkg.resolutions).forEach(([name, version]) => { distPkg.resolutions[name] = version.replace(/^\^/, ''); }); require('fs').writeFileSync('./dist/deps/package.json', JSON.stringify(distPkg, null, 2));" && cd ./dist/deps && bun i
scripts.format: bun run format:js && bun run format:go && bun run format:config
scripts.format:js:changed: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep '\(\.ts\|\.tsx\|\.html\|\.css\|\.scss\)$' | grep '^\(web\|entrypoint\|example\|prototypes\|util\|sdk\|plugin\)/' | xargs -I {} prettier --write {}
scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:go
scripts.lint: bun run lint:go && bun run lint:js
scripts.prepare: bun run clean && rimraf ./.tools && bun run vendor && bun run setup
